description.value:
Your devotion to Andoran's ideals is as much spiritual as philosophical. You gain the cleric's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Domain Initiate] feat but must select @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.EEZvDB1Z7ezwaxIr.JournalEntryPage.5MjSsuKOLBoiL8FB]{freedom}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.EEZvDB1Z7ezwaxIr.JournalEntryPage.lgsJz7mZ1OTe340e]{truth}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.EEZvDB1Z7ezwaxIr.JournalEntryPage.DI3MYGIK8iEycanU]{zeal} as your domain. You cast that domain's domain spell as a divine focus spell, and you Refocus by contemplating or spreading the ideas of the Common Rule rather than praying to a god. When an ability would manifest a divine symbol—such as the word of truth focus spell—it instead manifests as an eagle clutching a sword in its talons.

Special You can take this feat multiple times, selecting a different domain each time.
